languages.text: "Смиренно приветствую вас от лица династии фон Валанциус, Диодас аф Иррамон. Прежде всего возношу хвалу {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Богу-Императору{/g}: по Его воле наш союз свершился. Также хочу представить вам друга. {name} несомненно послан{mf||на} нам Его провидением в этот тяжелый час. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}Е{mf|го|ее} стараниями{/d} Себериан стоит перед нами со склоненной головой, как и подобает низвергнутому еретику".

traits.locale_text: "Смиренно приветствую вас от лица династии фон Валанциус, Диодас аф Иррамон. Прежде всего возношу хвалу {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Богу-Императору{/g}: по Его воле наш союз свершился. Также хочу представить вам друга. {name} несомненно послан{mf||на} нам Его провидением в этот тяжелый час. Е{mf|го|ее} стараниями Себериан стоит перед нами со склоненной головой, как и подобает низвергнутому еретику".
traits.speaker: JuvennaVonValancius

languages.text: "I humbly greet you on behalf of the von Valancius dynasty, Diodas af Irramon. First, I must offer praise to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}: by His will has our alliance been accomplished. I also wish to introduce a friend. {name} was undoubtedly sent to us by His providence in our hour of need. It is thanks to {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}{mf|his|her} efforts{/d} that Seberian now stands before us with bowed head, as befits a deposed heretic."
languages.original_text: "Смиренно приветствую вас от лица династии фон Валанциус, Диодас аф Иррамон. Прежде всего возношу хвалу {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Богу-Императору{/g}: по Его воле наш союз свершился. Также хочу представить вам друга. {name} несомненно послан{mf||на} нам Его провидением в этот тяжелый час. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}Е{mf|го|ее} стараниями{/d} Себериан стоит перед нами со склоненной головой, как и подобает низвергнутому еретику".

languages.text: “狄奥达斯·阿夫·伊拉蒙，我谨代表冯·瓦兰修斯王朝，向您致以诚挚的问候。首先，我必须赞颂{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}。凭祂的意志，我们得以结盟。此外，我还想引荐一位朋友。{name}无疑是我等危难之际，由神皇圣恩赐予我们的助力。正是得益于{mf|his|her}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}的努力{/d}，塞贝里安如今才会在我们面前低头伏罪，恰如一个被废黜的异端所应得的下场。”
languages.original_text: "I humbly greet you on behalf of the von Valancius dynasty, Diodas af Irramon. First, I must offer praise to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}: by His will has our alliance been accomplished. I also wish to introduce a friend. {name} was undoubtedly sent to us by His providence in our hour of need. It is thanks to {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}{mf|his|her} efforts{/d} that Seberian now stands before us with bowed head, as befits a deposed heretic."

traits.locale_text: “狄奥达斯·阿夫·伊拉蒙，我谨代表冯·瓦兰修斯王朝，向您致以诚挚的问候。首先，我必须赞颂{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}。凭祂的意志，我们得以结盟。此外，我还想引荐一位朋友。{name}无疑是我等危难之际，由神皇圣恩赐予我们的助力。正是得益于{mf|his|her}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}的努力{/d}，塞贝里安如今才会在我们面前低头伏罪，恰如一个被废黜的异端所应得的下场。”

languages.text: « Au nom de la dynastie von Valancius, je vous salue humblement, Diodas af Irramon. Pour commencer, je dois rendre grâce à l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} : par Sa volonté, notre alliance a porté {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}ses fruits{/d}. Par ailleurs, j'aimerais vous présenter {mf|un ami|une amie}. {name} nous a sans l'ombre d'un doute été {mf|envoyé|envoyée} par Sa divine providence à l'heure où nous en avions grand besoin. C'est grâce à ses efforts que Seberian se tient à présent devant nous, tête basse, comme il sied à un hérétique déchu. »
languages.original_text: "I humbly greet you on behalf of the von Valancius dynasty, Diodas af Irramon. First, I must offer praise to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}: by His will has our alliance been accomplished. I also wish to introduce a friend. {name} was undoubtedly sent to us by His providence in our hour of need. It is thanks to {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}{mf|his|her} efforts{/d} that Seberian now stands before us with bowed head, as befits a deposed heretic."

traits.locale_text: « Au nom de la dynastie von Valancius, je vous salue humblement, Diodas af Irramon. Pour commencer, je dois rendre grâce à l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} : par Sa volonté, notre alliance a porté {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}ses fruits{/d}. Par ailleurs, j'aimerais vous présenter {mf|un ami|une amie}. {name} nous a sans l'ombre d'un doute été {mf|envoyé|envoyée} par Sa divine providence à l'heure où nous en avions grand besoin. C'est grâce à ses efforts que Seberian se tient à présent devant nous, tête basse, comme il sied à un hérétique déchu. »

languages.text: "Von Valancius hanedanlığı adına sizi saygıyla selamlıyorum Diodas af İrramon. İlk olarak {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'a{/g} şükranlarımı sunmalıyım. İttifakımız, O'nun iradesiyle gerçekleşti. Ayrıca bir arkadaşımı da tanıtmak istiyorum. Şüphesiz {name}, ihtiyaç anımızda O'nun takdiriyle bize gönderildi. Seberian'ın şu anda görevden alınmış bir kâfire yakışır şekilde başı eğik hâlde önümüzde durması, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}kendisinin çabaları{/d} sayesindedir."
languages.original_text: "I humbly greet you on behalf of the von Valancius dynasty, Diodas af Irramon. First, I must offer praise to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}: by His will has our alliance been accomplished. I also wish to introduce a friend. {name} was undoubtedly sent to us by His providence in our hour of need. It is thanks to {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}{mf|his|her} efforts{/d} that Seberian now stands before us with bowed head, as befits a deposed heretic."

traits.locale_text: "Von Valancius hanedanlığı adına sizi saygıyla selamlıyorum Diodas af İrramon. İlk olarak {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'a{/g} şükranlarımı sunmalıyım. İttifakımız, O'nun iradesiyle gerçekleşti. Ayrıca bir arkadaşımı da tanıtmak istiyorum. Şüphesiz {name}, ihtiyaç anımızda O'nun takdiriyle bize gönderildi. Seberian'ın şu anda görevden alınmış bir kâfire yakışır şekilde başı eğik hâlde önümüzde durması, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}kendisinin çabaları{/d} sayesindedir."

languages.text: «Le saludo humildemente en nombre de la dinastía von Valancius, Diodas af Irramon. Primero, debo dar gracias al {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}: por Su voluntad, nuestra alianza ha llegado a buen puerto. También quiero presentarle a un{mf||a} amig{mf|o|a}. Sin duda, Su providencia nos ha enviado a {name} en estos momentos de necesidad. Gracias a sus esfuerzos, ahora Seberian se encuentra ante nosotros con la cabeza gacha, como corresponde a un hereje destituido».
languages.original_text: "I humbly greet you on behalf of the von Valancius dynasty, Diodas af Irramon. First, I must offer praise to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}: by His will has our alliance been accomplished. I also wish to introduce a friend. {name} was undoubtedly sent to us by His providence in our hour of need. It is thanks to {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}{mf|his|her} efforts{/d} that Seberian now stands before us with bowed head, as befits a deposed heretic."

traits.locale_text: «Le saludo humildemente en nombre de la dinastía von Valancius, Diodas af Irramon. Primero, debo dar gracias al {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}: por Su voluntad, nuestra alianza ha llegado a buen puerto. También quiero presentarle a un{mf||a} amig{mf|o|a}. Sin duda, Su providencia nos ha enviado a {name} en estos momentos de necesidad. Gracias a sus esfuerzos, ahora Seberian se encuentra ante nosotros con la cabeza gacha, como corresponde a un hereje destituido».

languages.text: "Ich grüße Euch demütig im Namen der Dynastie derer von Valancius, Diodas af Irramon. Zuerst möchte ich den {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} preisen: Sein Wille hat unsere Allianz möglich gemacht. Außerdem möchte ich Euch {mf|einen Freund|eine Freundin} vorstellen. {name} wurde uns in unserer Stunde der Not dank Seiner Voraussicht geschickt. Es ist {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}{mf|seinen|ihren} Bemühungen{/d} zu verdanken, dass Seberian jetzt mit geneigtem Haupt vor uns steht, wie es sich für einen entthronten Ketzer geziemt."
languages.original_text: "I humbly greet you on behalf of the von Valancius dynasty, Diodas af Irramon. First, I must offer praise to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}: by His will has our alliance been accomplished. I also wish to introduce a friend. {name} was undoubtedly sent to us by His providence in our hour of need. It is thanks to {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}{mf|his|her} efforts{/d} that Seberian now stands before us with bowed head, as befits a deposed heretic."

traits.locale_text: "Ich grüße Euch demütig im Namen der Dynastie derer von Valancius, Diodas af Irramon. Außerdem möchte ich Euch {mf|einen Freund|eine Freundin} vorstellen. {name} wurde uns in unserer Stunde der Not dank Seiner Voraussicht geschickt. Es ist {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}{mf|seinen|ihren} Bemühungen{/d} zu verdanken, dass Seberian jetzt mit geneigtem Haupt vor uns steht, wie es sich für einen entthronten Ketzer geziemt."

languages.text: 「ヴァランシウス家、ディオダス・ア・イルラモンが、皆様に敬意を表します。まず、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇帝{/g}様への賛辞を捧げます。神皇帝様の御意によって、我々の同盟が結ばれました。また、友人を紹介させていただきます。{name}は、我々の窮地に際して、神皇帝様の御導きによって我々に送られたのです。{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}{mf|彼の|彼女の}尽力{/d}によって、シベリアは今、ここに頭を垂れ、僭称した異端者として我々に立ち向かっています。」
languages.original_text: "I humbly greet you on behalf of the von Valancius dynasty, Diodas af Irramon. First, I must offer praise to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}: by His will has our alliance been accomplished. I also wish to introduce a friend. {name} was undoubtedly sent to us by His providence in our hour of need. It is thanks to {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}{mf|his|her} efforts{/d} that Seberian now stands before us with bowed head, as befits a deposed heretic."

traits.locale_text: 「ヴァランシウス家、ディオダス・ア・イルラモンが、皆様に敬意を表します。まず、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇帝{/g}様への賛辞を捧げます。神皇帝様の御意によって、我々の同盟が結ばれました。また、友人を紹介させていただきます。{name}は、我々の窮地に際して、神皇帝様の御導きによって我々に送られたのです。{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}{mf|彼の|彼女の}尽力{/d}によって、シベリアは今、ここに頭を垂れ、僭称した異端者として我々に立ち向かっています。」
